question

What does the 2015 EU Decision concerning restrictive measures in view of the situation in Libya change?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2015
- Document type: Decision
column2: CELEX 32015D0382 - Council Decision (CFSP) 2015/382 of 6 March 2015 amends Decision 2011/137/CFSP, extending the criteria for the travel ban and asset freeze measures (implementing UN Security Council Resolution 2174 (2014)).

column1:
Which 2013 Directive in the Trade domain postpones the transposition and application dates of the Solvency II Directive?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2013
- Document type: Directive
- Policy domain: Trade
column2: CELEX 32013L0058 - Directive 2013/58/EU of the European Parliament and of the Council of 11 December 2013, amending Directive 2009/138/EC (Solvency II) as regards the dates of transposition, application and the repeal of Solvency I directives.

column1:
Which 2015 Transport Directive updates the EU rules on port reception facilities for ship-generated waste to reflect the revised MARPOL Annex V garbage categories?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2015
- Document type: Directive
- Policy domain: Transport
column2: CELEX 32015L2087 - Commission Directive (EU) 2015/2087 of 18 November 2015, amending Annex II to Directive 2000/59/EC on port reception facilities for ship-generated waste and cargo residues.

column1:
Which 2014 EU Regulation lays down the rules on the information that Member States must send under the European Maritime and Fisheries Fund?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2014
- Document type: Regulation
column2: CELEX 32014R1243 - Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) No 1243/2014 of 20 November 2014, adopted pursuant to Regulation (EU) No 508/2014 on the European Maritime and Fisheries Fund.

column1:
Which 2014 EU Regulation amends Regulation (EU) No 965/2012 on the technical requirements and administrative procedures for air operations?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2014
- Document type: Regulation
column2: CELEX 32014R0379 - Commission Regulation (EU) No 379/2014 of 7 April 2014, amending Regulation (EU) No 965/2012 pursuant to the civil aviation Regulation (EC) No 216/2008.

column1:
Which 2015 Council Directive in the Finance domain adds a common minimum anti-abuse rule to the parent-subsidiary taxation Directive 2011/96/EU?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2015
- Document type: Directive
- Policy domain: Finance
column2: CELEX 32015L0121 - Council Directive (EU) 2015/121 of 27 January 2015, amending Directive 2011/96/EU on the common system of taxation applicable to parent companies and subsidiaries of different Member States by adding a common anti-abuse rule.

column1:
Which 2013 Directive in the Trade domain amends the batteries Directive 2006/66/EC as regards placing on the market of portable batteries containing cadmium and button cells containing mercury?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2013
- Document type: Directive
- Policy domain: Trade
column2: CELEX 32013L0056 - Directive 2013/56/EU of the European Parliament and of the Council of 20 November 2013, amending Directive 2006/66/EC on batteries and accumulators as regards the placing on the market of portable batteries containing cadmium (cordless power tools) and button cells with low mercury content.

column1:
Which 2014 Regulation in the Transport domain amends the EU Emissions Trading System Directive 2003/87/EC to limit aviation ETS coverage to flights within the European Economic Area (the 'stop the clock' approach)?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2014
- Document type: Regulation
- Policy domain: Transport
column2: CELEX 32014R0421 - Regulation (EU) No 421/2014 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 16 April 2014, amending Directive 2003/87/EC, in view of the implementation by 2020 of an international agreement and pending that, limiting the EU ETS to flights within the EEA.

column1:
Which 2015 Council Directive lays down the calculation methods and reporting requirements for the greenhouse-gas intensity of petrol and diesel fuels under the fuel quality Directive 98/70/EC?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2015
- Document type: Directive
column2: CELEX 32015L0652 - Council Directive (EU) 2015/652 of 20 April 2015, laying down calculation methods and reporting requirements pursuant to Article 7a of Directive 98/70/EC relating to the quality of petrol and diesel fuels.

column1:
Which 2014 Regulation amends Regulation (EC) No 539/2001 on the visa lists, and which third country does it move to the visa-exempt list?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2014
- Document type: Regulation
- Policy domain: Geography
column2: CELEX 32014R0259 - Regulation (EU) No 259/2014 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 3 April 2014, amending Regulation (EC) No 539/2001 by transferring the Republic of Moldova to the visa-exempt Annex II (for holders of biometric passports).

column1:
Which 2015 Regulation (codification) in the Law domain sets out the measures the Union may take following a report adopted by the WTO Dispute Settlement Body on anti-dumping and anti-subsidy matters?

Metadata filters (apply with AND):
- Year: 2015
- Document type: Regulation
- Policy domain: Law
column2: CELEX 32015R0476 - Regulation (EU) 2015/476 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 11 March 2015 on the measures that the Union may take following a report adopted by the WTO Dispute Settlement Body concerning anti-dumping and anti-subsidy matters (codification).
